legal_form.label: Legal Form of the Entity
legal_form.help: Specify the official registered legal form (e.g., Sole Proprietorship, SSC Agricultural Cooperative).

geographic_location.label: Geographic Location
geographic_location.help: Select the dominant geographical classification of the production plots.

altitude_meters.label: Altitude (Meters above sea level)
altitude_meters.help: Average altitude of the cultivated farmlands.

activity_start_year.label: Activity Start Year
activity_start_year.help: The exact year agricultural or transformation operations began under this entity.

has_on_site_farm_shop.label: On-Site Farm Shop Presence
has_on_site_farm_shop.help: Confirm if there is a permanent physical direct sales point setup on the farm premises.

land_tenure_type.label: Land Tenure Type
land_tenure_type.help: Main legal framework regulating farmland usage rights.

economic_sustenance_level.label: Economic Sustenance Level
economic_sustenance_level.help: Indicate if this farm represents the primary income source or a part-time secondary activity.

total_land_surface_sqm_or_ha.label: Total Farmland Surface Area
total_land_surface_sqm_or_ha.help: Specify total extension expressing clearly the unit used (e.g., 5 Hectares, 2500 SQM).

cultivated_surface_hectares.label: Cultivated Surface Area (Hectares)
cultivated_surface_hectares.help: Net fraction of land actively dedicated to ongoing crops or orchards.

greenhouse_surface_sqm.label: Greenhouse Surface Area (SQM)
greenhouse_surface_sqm.help: Total surface sheltered under permanent or seasonal greenhouses/tunnels.

main_machinery_equipment.label: Main Machinery and Equipment
main_machinery_equipment.help: List owned or shared vehicles, tractors, tools, and industrial transformation lines.

hr_family_workers_count.label: Family Workers Headcount
hr_family_workers_count.help: Number of family relatives active on the farm without standard external labor contracts.

hr_permanent_workers_count.label: Permanent Workers Headcount
hr_permanent_workers_count.help: Number of external employees hired under permanent/open-ended payroll agreements.

hr_seasonal_workers_count.label: Seasonal Workers Headcount
hr_seasonal_workers_count.help: Number of temporary staff brought in during peak harvesting seasons.

seasonal_employment_months_details.label: Seasonal Employment Window Details
seasonal_employment_months_details.help: Specify during which months seasonal workforce contracts are active (e.g., June-August).

hr_agency_or_external_coop_workers_count.label: External Agency or Cooperative Workers Headcount
hr_agency_or_external_coop_workers_count.help: Staff numbers supplied via external labor outsourcing or external agricultural service cooperatives.

applied_labor_contracts_type.label: Applied Collective Labor Contracts Type
applied_labor_contracts_type.help: Specify the exact framework trade contract applied to workers (e.g., National Agricultural CCNL).

workers_living_on_site_count.label: Workers Living On-Site Headcount
workers_living_on_site_count.help: Number of personnel or temporary workers accommodated directly inside farm facilities.

is_social_cooperative.label: Social Cooperative Status Indicator
is_social_cooperative.help: Check if the entity is registered formally as a social cooperative (e.g., Italian Law 381/91).

social_coop_total_member_workers.label: Social Coop Total Member Workers
social_coop_total_member_workers.help: Total working partner headcount inside the social cooperative structure.

social_coop_disadvantaged_workers_l381.label: Social Coop Disadvantaged Workers Count
social_coop_disadvantaged_workers_l381.help: Headcount of disadvantaged staff integrated under legal social protection layers.

social_coop_total_employees.label: Social Coop Total Employees Payroll Size
social_coop_total_employees.help: Global combined staff payload active on cooperative books.

labor_self_certification_compliance_stat.label: Labor Self-Certification Compliance Statement
labor_self_certification_compliance_stat.help: Formal self-declaration ensuring full compliance with binding labor laws, safety rules, and ethical rewards.

prevalent_production_method.label: Prevalent Production Method
prevalent_production_method.help: Main agronomic guideline model deployed systematically across the plots.

has_official_organic_certification.label: Official Organic Certification Status
has_official_organic_certification.help: Confirm if the farm holds a valid formal third-party organic certification status logo.

organic_certification_body_name.label: Organic Certification Body Name
organic_certification_body_name.help: Specify the accredited control body monitoring operations (e.g., ICEA, CCPB, Bioagricert).

organic_operator_code.label: Official Organic Operator Code
organic_operator_code.help: The unique national/regional registration alphanumeric code given by the control body.

organic_first_certification_year.label: First Year of Organic Certification
organic_first_certification_year.help: The fiscal year the farm completed its first full organic conversion cycle.

organic_last_inspection_date.label: Latest Organic Inspection Date
organic_last_inspection_date.help: Date tracking the latest physical regulatory field audit executed on premises.

previous_certification_bodies_change_rea.label: Reasons for Changing Control Bodies
previous_certification_bodies_change_rea.help: Detail historical triggers prompting shifts across external certifying companies if applicable.

non_certified_organic_rules_compliance_d.label: Non-Certified Organic Compliance Details
non_certified_organic_rules_compliance_d.help: If practicing un-certified organic, describe routines ensuring fidelity to agroecology rules.

organic_choice_motivation_lacking_logo_r.label: Organic Choices and Logo Discrepancy Reasons
organic_choice_motivation_lacking_logo_r.help: Explain values behind clean choices and reasons for avoiding standard state organic certification tracks.

conventional_integrated_chemical_inputs_.label: Conventional/Integrated Chemical Inputs Log
conventional_integrated_chemical_inputs_.help: If integrated/conventional, list synthetic treatments, pesticides, or chemical fertilizers used.

production_method_ideal_motivation_gmo_o.label: Agroecology Motivations and Anti-GMO Statement
production_method_ideal_motivation_gmo_o.help: Elaborate vision supporting ethical soil handling and explicit policy banning GMO vectors.

performs_periodic_chemical_analyses.label: Periodic Chemical Laboratory Soil/Water Analyses
performs_periodic_chemical_analyses.help: Confirm execution of laboratory screening checking for heavy metals or chemical residues.

last_chemical_analysis_date.label: Latest Chemical Laboratory Analysis Date
last_chemical_analysis_date.help: Logs the calendar date of the latest laboratory multiresidue analysis report.

irrigation_water_source.label: Irrigation Water Source Setup
irrigation_water_source.help: Identify delivery supply lines (e.g., Private well, Consorzio di Bonifica channel, Rain collection dams).

soil_fertility_management_manure_type_so.label: Soil Fertility and Manure Sourcing Rules
soil_fertility_management_manure_type_so.help: Detail inputs used to fix fertility levels (e.g., self-composting, external organic cattle manure sourcing).

manure_fertilizer_quantity_per_hectare_c.label: Fertilization Volumes Applied per Crop Group
manure_fertilizer_quantity_per_hectare_c.help: Quantify distribution averages (e.g., Quintals per hectare split across greenhouse and open fields).

weed_control_methodology.label: Weed Management Control Methodology
weed_control_methodology.help: Describe physical techniques applied (e.g., mechanical weeding, manual hoeing, green mulching, solarization).

pest_insect_disease_control_methodology.label: Crop Defense and Pest Management Protocols
pest_insect_disease_control_methodology.help: Detail treatments matching biocontrol lines (e.g., copper, sulfur, beneficial insects launch, macerates).

seeds_seedlings_origin_and_nature.label: Seeds and Seedlings Origin Tracker
seeds_seedlings_origin_and_nature.help: Identify provenance of propagation materials (e.g., local organic nursery, internal seed saving swaps).

pollution_sources_proximity_risk.label: Proximity Pollution Source Risk Layers
pollution_sources_proximity_risk.help: Select environmental threats active near plot borders.

pollution_source_distance_km_details.label: Pollution Source Distance and Containment Details
pollution_source_distance_km_details.help: Specify exact distances in kilometers and structural buffers built (e.g., thick protection hedges).

neighboring_farms_production_method.label: Neighboring Farms Production Guideline Models
neighboring_farms_production_method.help: Note practices utilized across boundaries to screen drift risks (e.g., conventional orchards spraying).

environmental_sustainability_energy_savi.label: Sustainability and Power Saving Features Deployed
environmental_sustainability_energy_savi.help: Check active environmental elements configured inside the operational loop.

offered_products_macro_categories.label: Commercial Catalog Product Macro-Categories
offered_products_macro_categories.help: Select items routinely present inside the wholesale/retail price lists.

transformation_entirely_in_house.label: In-House Product Transformation Status
transformation_entirely_in_house.help: Confirm if manufacturing/processing occurs completely inside dedicated certified farm labs.

third_party_processing_company_location_.label: Third-Party Processing Partner Details
third_party_processing_company_location_.help: If processing is outsourced, specify the company name, tracking location, and organic certification credentials.

commercializes_third_party_products.label: Third-Party Products Brokerage Commercialization
commercializes_third_party_products.help: Confirm if price lists integrate external commodities bought from other farms for resale.

third_party_products_revenue_percentage.label: Third-Party Brokerage Income Percentage Weight
third_party_products_revenue_percentage.help: Incidence percentage of resale volumes over the overall corporate farm turnover.

active_sales_channels.label: Active Farm Sourcing Sales Channels
active_sales_channels.help: Check distribution formats operated to empty stocks.

farmers_markets_details_and_frequency.label: Farmers Markets Specific Attendance and Frequency
farmers_markets_details_and_frequency.help: List solidary and local farmers markets frequented regular hours (e.g., weekly Earth Market).

gas_delivery_mode.label: GAS Delivery and Dispatch Logistics Mode
gas_delivery_mode.help: Primary logistics node used to channel collective boxes ordered by solidary purchase rings.

specific_delivery_conditions_minimum_ord.label: Minimum Orders Constraints and Delivery Fees Condition
specific_delivery_conditions_minimum_ord.help: Specify structural hurdles or rules configured (e.g., minimum 150€ box value for free delivery).

costs_transparency_and_transparent_price.label: Transparent Pricing Cost Breakdown Framework Policy
costs_transparency_and_transparent_price.help: Confirm open calculation shares detailing labor, fuel, and profit margins to consumers.

fiscal_payment_mode.label: Primary Fiscal Document Payment Format
fiscal_payment_mode.help: The standard legal accounting receipt route used during order clearing actions.

indicative_turnover_current_year.label: Indicative Farm Income - Current Year Range
indicative_turnover_current_year.help: Rough aggregate income tier reflecting the ongoing seasonal clearing volume.

indicative_turnover_previous_year.label: Indicative Farm Income - Previous Year Range
indicative_turnover_previous_year.help: Consolidated overall revenue ledger closed during the preceding fiscal year.

indicative_turnover_year_minus_two.label: Indicative Farm Income - Two Years Ago Range
indicative_turnover_year_minus_two.help: Historical reference turnover boundary ledger matching the older period.

gas_presenter_name.label: Sponsoring GAS Presenter Person Name
gas_presenter_name.help: Name of the active solidary consumer member introducing and validating the farm inside the network.

public_connected_activities.label: Public Connected Multi-functional Activities Managed
public_connected_activities.help: Check secondary services hosted on site (e.g., Educational farm tasks, Social Agritourism).

ideal_gas_visit_period.label: Optimal Period for Peer PGS Inspection Visits
ideal_gas_visit_period.help: Best calendar window for execution of group field audit sessions (e.g., Spring harvest, May).

active_or_past_gas_network_collaboration.label: Historical GAS Solidary Network Cooperation Record
active_or_past_gas_network_collaboration.help: Detail older or current common projects, group buying agreements, or co-investment tasks.

ethical_social_practices_territorial_imp.label: Explicit Territorial Social and Ethical Practices Policy
ethical_social_practices_territorial_imp.help: Check if running clear procedures targeting community aid, insertion tracks, or open hosting.

ethical_practices_specific_types.label: Ethical and Proactive Social Framework Practices Type
ethical_practices_specific_types.help: Select areas of direct localized non-profit or inclusion commitment.

commitment_gas_charter_of_intents_cohere.label: Coherence Pledge with GAS Charter of Intents Values
commitment_gas_charter_of_intents_cohere.help: Binding strategic alignment confirming adherence to global economy of solidarity definitions.

commitment_allow_gas_inspection_visits.label: Open Gate Peer-Led Visit Audit Consent Agreement
commitment_allow_gas_inspection_visits.help: Binding agreement allowing unannounced check-ins from consumers and peer producers.

commitment_regular_updates_certs_price_l.label: Price List Transparency and Documents Update Promise
commitment_regular_updates_certs_price_l.help: Mandatory promise to upload fresh certifications, laboratory screens, and wholesale price balances immediately.

commitment_personal_data_processing_auth.label: Data Processing and Open Web Registry Disclosure Authorization
commitment_personal_data_processing_auth.help: Mandatory privacy consent enabling public hosting of farm sheets on network server maps.
